texto: They warn you that you're gonna have to make sacrifices, but i guess that means different things to different people, like giving up something you really want now for something you've wanted your whole life, or spending less time on yourself, so you can spend more time with someone you love. At some point you might even have to give up your own sense of safety and well being, but after a while it doesn't feel like you're giving up anything at all.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Scrubs J.D: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “They warn you that you're gonna have to make sacrifices, but i guess that means different things …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sacrifice, different pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.

frase_original: They warn you that you're gonna have to make sacrifices, but i guess that means different things to different people, like giving up something you really want now for something you've wanted your whole life, or spending less time on yourself, so you can spend more time with someone you love. At some point you might even have to give up your own sense of safety and well being, but after a while it doesn't feel like you're giving up anything at all.

texto: I don't think people are meant to be by themselves. That's why you actually find someone you care about. It's important to let go of the little things, even if you can't let go all the way. Because nothing sucks more than feeling all alone, no matter how many people are around.
explicacao: Citação de Scrubs J.D sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't think people are meant to be by themselves. That's why you actually find someone you care…” articula reflexao, alone, lonely em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como lonely.
